The question is asking to determine the number of competitions held in Monte Carlo, Monaco. Since each row represents a competition and the "venue" column indicates the location of each competition, we need to group by the "venue" column to count how many competitions took place in Monte Carlo. We can use the f_group_column(venue) operation to group the competitions based on their venue to analyze this situation.

The sub-table shows that there were 2 competitions held in Monte Carlo, Monaco. Both competitions were the World Athletics Final, and they were grouped together based on the venue. Therefore, the number of competitions held in Monte Carlo, Monaco is 2.
